rows.label: qev055103_MSG0001
rows.name:
Overwhelming strength that makes
nothing of a Definia— As expected
of the ones we placed our trust in.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0002
rows.name:
Please continue to decisively eliminate
anyone who intends to harm us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_JNK0010
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev055103_SEL0011
rows.name:
Promise that you won't
let your targets escape.

rows.label: qev055103_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev055103_SEL0021
rows.name:
Chide Sun'osaragu for his
bloodthirsty way of thinking.

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0003
rows.name:
How reliable... You are a far superior
group of killers than the Definia.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Alright, anyway, let's head
back quickly. We have no time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0005
rows.name:
To acknowledge some sort of value in targets
taking hostile action against you... Earthlings
truly are incomprehensible creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0006
rows.name:
External enemies with no utility should simply
be killed. The Growth, at least, would do so
without a moment's hesitation, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Well, whatever. Let's head
back quickly. We have no time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0008
rows.name:
We must increase the number of individuals
on this planet as soon as possible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0009
rows.name:
Just like you said...
I'm going to die...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0010
rows.name:
...But... I won't let some
insect... look down on me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0011
rows.name: I refuse to die... like this!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0012
rows.name:
Ah... the Ovah is...
fading away............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0013
rows.name:
Is this... death? But, I still
have... things I must do...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0014
rows.name:
This is...?! Are you saying we
didn't make it in time...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0015
rows.name:
It is alright. Sun'osaragu... you
are still breathing, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0016
rows.name:
...I won't last much longer, but... Yes,
for a little while longer............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0017
rows.name:
Then we shall use Senirapa
Water to pass your wisdom and
will to the next generation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0018
rows.name:
Kun'eibu... this is our last Senirapa
Water! If we use this, we'll...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0019
rows.name:
There is a possibility we may find more Senirapa
Water eventually. However, if Sun'osaragu's wisdom
is lost here, we will never attain it again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0020
rows.name:
Now, use the Senirapa Water!
Multiply Sun'osaragu's life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_JNK0030
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev055103_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask about Senirapa Water.

rows.label: qev055103_JNK0040
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev055103_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask what he means by
"multiplying his life."

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0021
rows.name:
It is miraculous water that activates
the power of the Ovah, granting
us the continuity of life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0022
rows.name:
Watch closely. This is
what we Orphe are![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0023
rows.name:
Watch closely, Earthling. This is the
continuity of life for us Orphe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0024
rows.name:
Sun'osaragu, release that life,
that Ovah, into the light![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0025
rows.name:
Divided entities born from
Sun'osaragu— The birth of
Tan'osaragu and Ten'osaragu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0026
rows.name: ...My name is... Tan'osaragu...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0027
rows.name: ...I am... Ten'osaragu...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0028
rows.name:
Yes, children of the Ovah. It
seems we made it in time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Earthling, we do not engage
in inefficient reproductive
activities like animals.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0030
rows.name:
We multiply by using Senirapa Water in
this way to divide our own bodies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_JNK0050
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev055103_SEL0051
rows.name:
Nod deeply, moved by the
birth of a new form of life.

rows.label: qev055103_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev055103_SEL0061
rows.name:
Frown, stating that it deviates
from the logic of life.

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0031
rows.name:
This is the power of the Ovah... Well?
Is it not a wonderful way of existing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0032
rows.name:
Most aliens show no
understanding of it, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0033
rows.name:
As expected of an Earthling.
It would have been wonderful
if you had an Ovah too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0034
rows.name:
Indeed, most aliens show no
understanding of it. We are
accustomed to such treatment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0035
rows.name:
However, reproductive activities requiring a mate
are nothing more than high-risk multiplication
methods that end the moment one half is lost.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0036
rows.name:
...But, Kun'eibu, we have completely
exhausted the Senirapa Water. What
are we going to do now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0037
rows.name:
Are we supposed to live on this planet
with only the new two and the four of us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0038
rows.name:
First, let us return to NLA and formulate a plan. It
will be alright. With our wisdom and the guidance of
the Ovah, we will surely reach the correct answer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0039
rows.name: I will follow you anywhere, Kun'eibu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0040
rows.name:
No, I simply trust... this flow
of the Ovah telling me that I
should believe in your judgment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0041
rows.name:
...Then we will head back first. Earthling,
Sun'osaragu's life was lost, but we managed
to avoid the worst-case scenario.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055103_MSG0042
rows.name:
Please continue to lend your strength to
powerless beings like us, and help the
Orphe prosper. I am counting on you.[ST:wait ]
